title: cassutha suaveolens
intro: Cassutha suaveolens, also known as Purple Sage, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cassutha suaveolens include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Cassutha suaveolens can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as in topical applications like salves and creams.
